## removeAttachmentDescriptor variable

Centralized descriptor for the `detach` command.

Drives CLI subcommand `detach` and MCP tool `attachment_remove`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
removeAttachmentDescriptor: import("../registry/define.js").ResolvedCommandDescriptor<{
    taskId: string;
    attachmentName: string;
}, RemoveAttachmentResult, z.ZodObject<{
    taskId: z.ZodString;
    attachmentName: z.ZodString;
}, "strip", z.ZodTypeAny, {
    taskId: string;
    attachmentName: string;
}, {
    taskId: string;
    attachmentName: string;
}>>
```
